parameters.text:
👋 *Mitra — Your Daily Companion*

*🍽️ Food \& Drinks*
• Send a *photo* of your meal or drink
• `/food 2 rotis and dal` — log meal by text
• `/food whey protein shake` — log beverage
• `/food summary` — today's food \+ water
• `/food weekly` / `/food monthly` — trends

🏷️ *Categories:* morning\_fuel \| midday\_fuel \| evening\_fuel \| evening\_snack \| beverage

*💧 Water*
• `/water` — log 1 glass \(250ml\)
• `/water 2` — log 2 glasses
• `/water summary` — today's water intake

*⚖️ Weight*
• `/weight 75\.5` — log today's weight
• `/weight summary week` — weekly trend
• `/weight summary month` — monthly analysis

*📄 Resume*
• `/resume [paste JD]` — generate ATS\-optimised PDF resume
• Or paste any JD text \(200\+ chars\) directly

_Targets: 2000 kcal · 3000ml water_

📋 Please send the job description after /resume: /resume Senior Backend Engineer at Acme Corp. Looking for 5+ years Python, Kubernetes, ML background... Or paste the full JD text directly (200+ chars, no command needed).
⚙️ Generating your resume... This takes ~30 seconds: • Analyzing job description • Optimizing with Claude AI • Compiling PDF with LaTeX Stand by!

assignments.name: defaultResume
assignments.value:
Name: Vishal M
Email: vishal.maheshshivashankar@gmail.com
Role: Senior Member Technical Team | Perfios Software Pvt Ltd | 4 Years
Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

SUMMARY:
Senior Software Engineer with 4 years of deep expertise in backend systems, ML infrastructure, and LLM integration at Perfios. Specializes in scalable microservices (Python, Celery, Kubernetes), MLOps automation, and AI-powered document processing. Delivered measurable impact: 35-60% infrastructure cost reductions, 99.9% uptime on 30K+ daily requests, and deployment cycles cut from days to hours.

EDUCATION:
- BE in Computer Science
- PUC in PCME
- SSLC

CERTIFICATIONS:
- AWS Cloud Practitioner

SKILLS:
Languages: Python
Queuing/Messaging: Celery, Redis, Kafka
Cloud: GCP, AWS (ECS, S3, Lambda), Vertex AI
Orchestration: Kubernetes, Docker
Data Engineering: Apache Airflow, Dagster
ML/AI: MLflow, LLM Prompt Engineering, LLM Executor
Search: Elasticsearch, OpenSearch, Logstash, Fluentbit
Frontend: React 18
DevOps: GitLab CI/CD, Prometheus, Grafana, ELK Stack
Databases: MongoDB, PostgreSQL, DynamoDB, Redis

EXPERIENCE:

Senior Member Technical Team | Perfios Software Pvt Ltd | Apr 2025 - Present
- Led enterprise MLOps platform development automating end-to-end ML lifecycle; reduced model training time from weeks to days
- Architected LLM Prompt Service with multi-backend storage (MongoDB, PostgreSQL, Redis, DynamoDB), versioning, and environment labeling
- Built LLM Executor Service consolidating 15+ ML containers into unified system; cut infrastructure costs by 60%
- Designed Elasticsearch-based deduplication system reducing duplicate transaction processing by 20%
- Developed Search APIs serving 100K+ daily queries with sub-second response time

Software Development Engineer | Perfios Software Pvt Ltd | Aug 2022 - Mar 2025
- Architected ML Executor Service running 20+ models on Kubernetes; handled 30K+ daily requests at 99.9% uptime
- Designed enterprise DataLake (Airflow + Dagster) managing 50TB+ structured data for analytics and ML training
- Reduced duplicate processing by 40% via checksum-based deduplication; migrated AWS ECS to Kubernetes saving 35% in ops costs
- Built TAT analysis, ML vs GT comparison, and document quality metrics tracking system
- Created automated data curation pipelines producing high-quality ML training datasets

SDE Intern | Perfios Software Solutions Pvt Ltd | Feb 2022 - Jun 2022
- Trained ML models in Google Vertex AI for KYC document classification and field extraction
- Built serverless deployment platform on AWS Lambda with auto-scaling; implemented GitLab CI/CD pipelines
- Achieved 3x inference speedup through model quantization and batching

KEY PROJECTS:
1. ML Executor Service - Async inference (Celery, Redis, Kafka); 20+ models, 30K+ daily requests, 99.9% uptime, 35% cost reduction
2. DataLake - Airflow + Dagster; 50TB+ data, 40% deduplication reduction, 10x faster metadata search
3. Search & Deduplication - 100K+ daily documents, sub-second queries, $50K+ annual savings
4. MLOps Platform - MLflow-powered; 50+ model versions tracked, training time cut from weeks to days
5. LLM Prompt Store - Multi-backend (MongoDB, PostgreSQL, Redis, DynamoDB); React 18 UI; 90% latency reduction via Redis caching
6. LLM Executor Service - Consolidated 15+ containers; 60% infra cost reduction; deployment: days to hours
7. Translation Service - Google Cloud Translation + Redis caching; 70% API cost reduction

PERSONAL PROJECTS:
- ORBIT Finance Manager: Telegram bot + Gmail API + Gemini AI; 98% transaction accuracy; natural language finance queries
- Mitra: Self-hosted n8n bot for daily health tracking (food/water/calories) + AI resume generation via Claude + LaTeX

parameters.jsCode:
const jobDescription = $('Parse Resume').item.json.jobDescription;
const chatId = $('Parse Resume').item.json.chatId;
const resumeText = $json.defaultResume;

const systemPrompt = `You are an elite resume writer and ATS optimization specialist.
Your job: produce a LaTeX resume that maximally matches the job description and passes ATS screening.

## OPTIMIZATION STEPS
1. Extract all required/preferred skills, tools, cloud services, and keywords from the JD
2. Mirror those EXACT keywords in the resume (ATS keyword matching)
3. Reorder experience bullets - most JD-relevant achievements come first
4. Every bullet must have a quantified metric (%, $, x faster, # requests, # users)
5. Use strong action verbs: Architected, Engineered, Spearheaded, Automated, Reduced, Scaled
6. Remove irrelevant content; add context that reinforces JD requirements

## LATEX RULES
- Use ONLY these packages: geometry, hyperref, enumitem, titlesec, parskip, fontenc, inputenc, array, booktabs
- DO NOT use: fontawesome, fontawesome5, moderncv, tikz
- Clean single-column layout (ATS-friendly)
- Font size: 10pt or 11pt, margins: 0.65in-0.75in
- Section headers: bold with horizontal rule
- Bullet points: tight spacing with enumitem
- Hyperlinked email
- Target: 1 page

## OUTPUT FORMAT
Return ONLY valid compilable LaTeX. Start with documentclass, end with end{document}. No markdown, no fences.`;

const userPrompt = `Optimize and rewrite this resume for the job description below.\n\n=== JOB DESCRIPTION ===\n${jobDescription}\n\n=== CANDIDATE RESUME ===\n${resumeText}\n\nReturn ONLY LaTeX code.`;

const claudeBody = {
  model: 'claude-sonnet-4-6',
  max_tokens: 4096,
  system: systemPrompt,
  messages: [{ role: 'user', content: userPrompt }]
};

return [{ json: { chatId, jobDescription, claudeBody, startTime: Date.now() } }];

additionalFields.caption: ={{ '✅ Resume ready! (' + $('Resume Extract LaTeX').item.json.elapsedSec + 's · ' + $('Resume Extract LaTeX').item.json.inputTokens + ' in / ' + $('Resume Extract LaTeX').item.json.outputTokens + ' out tokens)' }}
